1002.rationale: out-of-scope (triage): YuanShen.exe is Genshin Impact (kernel-level mhyprot anti-cheat). Out of scope per documented anti-cheat exclusion.

1109.rationale: out-of-scope (triage): BFME2 no-CD patcher fails with NtQuerySystemInformation Invalid parameter — Wine NT subsystem stub limitation. Wine internals, out of scope.

1153.rationale: out-of-scope (triage): Alien Isolation launched via Heroic + Epic Games Store, broke between 2.3.2 and 2.3.3. Third-party launcher chain (Heroic+EGS) is out-of-scope per v1.0 exclusions.

1159.rationale: already-fixed (triage): STAB-01,STAB-04 — Same 2.3.3 launch-time crash in Foundation directory enumerator on macOS 15. Resolved by fork rebuild on current Sequoia SDK and code signing fixes shipped in v3.0.x.

1166.rationale: out-of-scope (triage): Quake II RTX needs Vulkan ray-tracing GPU. macOS has no VK_KHR_ray_tracing pipeline support; this is a hardware/driver limitation, not addressable in app layer.

1168.rationale: out-of-scope (triage): Rivals of Aether 2 lobby creation fails 'Unknown Error' — Steam P2P / NAT traversal / matchmaking, not a Wine-app-layer fix. Networking/Steamworks scope.

1175.rationale: already-fixed (triage): CTRL-04 — CS2 mouse erratic in fullscreen — that's the Retina mouse position scaling bug fixed by CTRL-04.

1230.rationale: out-of-scope (triage): Lethal Company multiplayer lobby crashes. Multiplayer/anti-cheat networking; per v1.0 exclusions, anti-cheat is out of scope. May also relate to MISC-02 clipboard fix already applied.

1232.rationale: already-fixed (triage): CFGF-02,PROC-01,PROC-03 — Same 'bottle disappears after creation' regression. Resolved by CFGF-02 / PROC-01 lifecycle work that made bottle persistence atomic and survive process cleanup.

525.rationale: out-of-scope (triage): macOS has no 'Game Mode' API; macOS 14+ Game Mode auto-activates for full-screen GPU-heavy apps. Whisky cannot toggle it. Out of scope.
